title: Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
company: Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group

jsonLd.title: Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group!
